allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\omara\\Downloads\\joride-full-launch-ready-final \(4\)\\joride-full-launch-ready-final\\JoFront"; $out = flutter analyze lib 2>&1 | Out-String; $lines = $out -split "`n"; "=== severity counts ==="; "error: " + \($lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\berror\\b' -and $_ -match '\\.dart' }\).Count; "warning: " + \($lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\bwarning\\b' -and $_ -match '\\.dart' }\).Count; "info: " + \($lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\binfo\\b' -and $_ -match '\\.dart' }\).Count; "=== first 20 dart issues ==="; $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\.dart' } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\omara\\Downloads\\joride-full-launch-ready-final \(4\)\\joride-full-launch-ready-final\\JoFront\\assets"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir | Out-Null }; Write-Host "assets folder ready")
